mapper.select:
select codetext from synlte.fieldcode where codeid = #{codeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and codename = 'JZCODE0024'

select distinct f1.codeid as codeId, f1.codetext as codeText, f2.valtext as valText, f2.valvalue as valValue from synlte.fieldcode f1 inner join synlte.fieldcodeval f2 on f1.codeid = f2.codeid and f1.parcodeid = 'JZCODE0024' where valvalue = #{value}

select distinct f1.codeid as codeId, f1.codetext as codeText, f2.valtext as valText, f2.valvalue as valValue from synlte.fieldcode f1 inner join synlte.fieldcodeval f2 on f1.codeid = f2.codeid and f1.parcodeid = 'JZCODE0024'

select distinct * from synlte.fieldcode
deleted = 0
and ( codeId in (select parcodeid from synlte.fieldcode where upper(codeId) = upper(#{codeId})) or upper(codeId) = upper(#{codeId}) )
and ( upper(codeName) like upper('%${codeName}%')
or upper(codeText) like upper('%${codeText}%')
)
and upper(codeText) like upper('%${codeText}%')

select distinct codeId as id, codeid as value, codetext as name from synlte.fieldcode
upper(codeId) like upper('%' || #{condition} || '%') or upper(codetext) like upper('%' || #{condition} || '%')
and codename != 'JZCODE_0024'

select distinct codeid as value, codetext as label from synlte.fieldcode
codename != 'JZCODE_0024'
(upper(codetext) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchText},'%'))))

select f1.CODEID as codeId, f1.CODETEXT as codeText, f2.VALTEXT as valText, f2.valvalue as valValue from synlte.fieldcode f1 inner join synlte.fieldcodeval f2 on f1.CODEid = f2.CODEID and f1.PARCODEID = 'GBT2260' and valtext is not null and codetext != valtext and f2.valvalue is not null
select distinct codename as id, codetext as name from V_CLASSIFY_INFO where PARCODEID = #{sjzzflCodeId} or PARCODEID = 'JZCODEJZSJZZFL' order by codename
